result.summary: Created all DevOps infrastructure configuration files. Nginx vhost config (packman-edu.conf) with HTTPS, WASM MIME types, aggressive caching for .wasm files. Security headers (headers.conf) with COOP/COEP for SharedArrayBuffer support. OCI VM provision script (provision.sh) installs Nginx, Certbot, configures firewall. SSL setup script (setup-certbot.sh) for Let's Encrypt. Deploy script (deploy.sh) uses rsync for deployment. Healthcheck script (healthcheck.sh) for uptime monitoring.

value.summary: Created all DevOps infrastructure configuration files. Nginx vhost config (packman-edu.conf) with HTTPS, WASM MIME types, aggressive caching for .wasm files. Security headers (headers.conf) with COOP/COEP for SharedArrayBuffer support. OCI VM provision script (provision.sh) installs Nginx, Certbot, configures firewall. SSL setup script (setup-certbot.sh) for Let's Encrypt. Deploy script (deploy.sh) uses rsync for deployment. Healthcheck script (healthcheck.sh) for uptime monitoring.
